settings.heroTitle: Encounter grace in the quiet fire of community.
settings.heroDescription: Retreats, worship nights, and formation experiences for people seeking depth, healing, and renewed faith.
settings.aboutHeading: A sacred space designed for modern seekers.
settings.aboutText: Aurora Ministry creates spaces where prayer becomes practical, community feels like shelter, and people can listen deeply for the voice of God.

aboutCards.title: Formation
aboutCards.description: Teaching and practices that help faith become embodied.

aboutCards.title: Retreats
aboutCards.description: Immersive weekends for stillness, restoration, and discernment.

aboutCards.title: Community
aboutCards.description: Gatherings shaped by hospitality, beauty, and honest prayer.

aboutCards.title: Mission
aboutCards.description: Serving the city through mercy, presence, and creative witness.

settings.galleryTitle: Moments of prayer, friendship, and quiet wonder.
settings.galleryDescription: A living visual archive of retreats, worship nights, and ministry gatherings.
settings.testimonialQuote: This ministry helped me hear God again without pressure, performance, or noise.
settings.aboutPageTitle: We build spaces where attention becomes prayer.

aboutValues.title: Vision
aboutValues.description: A generation formed by stillness, mercy, courage, and joyful belonging.

aboutValues.title: Mission
aboutValues.description: To host retreats and gatherings that help people encounter God and return renewed.

aboutValues.title: Posture
aboutValues.description: Beautiful, uncluttered, honest, contemplative, and deeply hospitable.

settings.leadershipTitle: A small team carrying a spacious vision.

leaders.name: Elena Grace
leaders.bio: Spiritual formation, retreat design, and pastoral care.

leaders.name: Marcus Hale
leaders.bio: Creating spacious worship environments with beauty and restraint.

leaders.name: Naomi Reed
leaders.bio: Hospitality, small groups, and care for new guests.

settings.storyTitle: From living-room prayer to citywide retreats.

storyItems.text: A weekly prayer gathering begins with twelve friends around a table..
The ministry hosts its first guided silent retreat.
Formation cohorts, worship nights, and pastoral care partnerships expand.
Aurora serves churches and seekers through retreats, community, and creative hospitality.
